updateNote: Day 79 (11:02 PM PDT May 16): Trump posts 'Calm Before the Storm' AI war imagery on Truth Social — 24-hour Iran strike decision window per Israeli media. Iran formalizes PGSA Hormuz toll ($2M/vessel, Chinese yuan, US Project Freedom excluded). Araghchi on state TV: 'Iran was the victor in this war.' Hezbollah drone swarm at IDF north Israel base + rockets intercepted in south Lebanon. Trump to BFM TV: Iran will have 'a very bad time.' Orders Navy to destroy Iranian mines in the Strait. Brent ~$111, WTI ~$106.50. Gas $4.52. Blockade Day 76.
